ideation: This sequence simulates the act of gently presenting a ring, emphasizing care and precision. The right arm extends, offering the ring with a slight bow, while the left arm remains at the side for balance. The movement is slow and deliberate, reflecting the significance of the gesture. In the first frame, both arms are relaxed at the sides. The second frame shows the right arm extending forward, with the hand slightly cupped. The wrist is rotated so the palm faces upward. The third frame depicts the right arm slightly lowered, as if presenting the ring. The fourth frame shows the right arm returning to a relaxed position, and the left arm remains still. This sequence is designed to convey the delicate nature of offering a ring, enhancing the emotional impact of the gesture.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm extends forward, palm up, offering the ring
the right arm lowers slightly, presenting the ring gently
right arm returns to the side, gesture complete
